jobs.name: ILMA Hourly Optimizer
jobs.prompt:
Run comprehensive ILMA system optimization — Hermes update, capability scan, auto-wire, workflow/pipeline E2E check, wiring verification, health check, self-improvement cycle, git sync.

Execute:
```
cd /root/.hermes/profiles/ilma && python3 ilma_optimizer_daemon.py
```

The daemon handles all 8 steps internally. Report only the final summary output.
